charge_head_on.name: Charge head-on
charge_head_on.description: Close at full speed instead of maneuvering for position.

pattern.text: fighter mid far range approach flank behind position tactical engage charge straight pursue

content.context: Standing order: charge head-on, no positioning play

flank_attack_runs.name: Flank attack runs
flank_attack_runs.description: Work behind the target before committing to an attack.

pattern.text: fighter mid range approach engage position tactical flank behind angle attack run

content.context: Standing order: attack from behind, never head-on

keep_clear_of.name: Keep clear of {target_class}s
keep_clear_of.description: Break away rather than engage near this ship class.

pattern.text: fighter {target_class} close mid range retreat evade danger escape keep distance

cautious_engagement.name: Cautious engagement
cautious_engagement.description: Probe carefully and keep an escape line open.

pattern.text: fighter far mid range approach engage cautious careful weave dodge

finish_damaged_targets.name: Finish damaged targets
finish_damaged_targets.description: Always shoot the most damaged enemy in range first.

pattern.text: target priority damaged disabled weak threat select finish
